# CareMyTrip

> Travel is the only thing you buy that makes you richer. CareMyTrip.com is a registered, Dehradun-based travel company (since 2013) specialising in Chardham Yatra, Himalayan and India tour packages, plus select international trips.

CareMyTrip plans pilgrimages and holidays end-to-end: stays, transport, darshan assistance and 24x7 support. Areas served: India, Nepal, Thailand, Malaysia, Canada, Kuwait.

## Geo
- Country: India
- Region: Uttarakhand
- City: Dehradun
- Postal code: 248003
- Coordinates: 30.3165° N, 78.0322° E
- Service area: India, Nepal, Thailand, Malaysia, Canada, Kuwait
- Time zone: Asia/Kolkata (UTC+5:30)

- Site: https://www.caremytrip.com/
- Sitemap: https://www.caremytrip.com/sitemap.xml
- Language: en-IN
- Primary topics: Chardham Yatra, Kedarnath, Badrinath, Gangotri, Yamunotri, Auli, Harsil, Kerala, Nepal, Vietnam, Kashmir, Ladakh, Himachal, Andaman, Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Golden Triangle, Kumbh Mela, Valley of Flowers, Hemkund Sahib
- Audience: Indian and NRI travellers; pilgrims; families; senior citizens; honeymooners; group travellers

## Tour packages
- [Ek Dham Yatra — Kedarnath Ji from Haridwar](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=ek-dham-kedarnath-haridwar) — Kedarnath, Uttarakhand, 3N / 4D, INR 12,900 (35% OFF). A focused 4-day pilgrimage to the revered Kedarnath shrine, starting and ending at Haridwar.
- [Do Dham Yatra from Haridwar 2026 — Kedarnath & Badrinath](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=do-dham-haridwar) — Kedarnath & Badrinath, Uttarakhand, 5N / 6D, INR 19,000 (24% OFF). Two of the four sacred dhams on a well-paced 6-day circuit from Haridwar.
- [Do Dham Yatra from Delhi 2026 — Kedarnath & Badrinath](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=do-dham-delhi) — Kedarnath & Badrinath (ex-Delhi), 7N / 8D, INR 26,900 (10% OFF). Door-to-door Do Dham pilgrimage starting from Delhi.
- [Chardham Yatra from Haridwar 2026 — 9N/10D](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=chardham-haridwar-2026) — Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath & Badrinath, 9N / 10D, INR 25,900 (19% OFF). The complete Char Dham circuit over a comfortable 10-day journey from Haridwar.
- [Chardham Yatra by Helicopter 2026](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=chardham-helicopter-2026) — All four dhams by helicopter, 6 Days, INR 2,35,000 (4% OFF). VIP darshan, premium stays and breathtaking Himalayan aerial views.
- [10 Days Luxury Char Dham Yatra from Haridwar](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=luxury-chardham-10-days) — All four dhams — Luxury, 9N / 10D, INR 99,000. Handpicked premium hotels and dedicated assistance.
- [5 Nights Harsil Village Luxury Tour](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=harsil-village-luxury) — Harsil, Uttarakhand, 5N / 6D, INR 26,900 (10% OFF). Unwind in the apple-orchard hamlet of Harsil near Gangotri with luxury stays.
- [Amazing Kerala — 05 Nights / 06 Days](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=amazing-kerala) — Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey & Kovalam, 4N / 5D, INR 14,200 (25% OFF). Tea-carpeted Munnar hills, Thekkady spice country and an Alleppey houseboat.
- [Basant Panchami Kumbh Mela Tour](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=basant-panchami-kumbh) — Prayagraj / Holy Sangam, 4N / 5D, INR 75,000 (16% OFF). The world's largest spiritual gathering with curated tented stays and guided rituals.
- [Auli by Helicopter](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=auli-by-heli) — Auli, Uttarakhand, 2N / 3D, INR 35,500. Snow-clad slopes, Asia's highest ropeway and panoramic views of Nanda Devi.
- [Nepal — Kathmandu & Pokhara](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=kathmandu-pokhara-6d) — Kathmandu & Pokhara, Nepal, 5N / 6D, On request. Temples, stupas and the serene lakes of Pokhara with Himalayan panoramas.
- [Vietnam — Hanoi & Halong Bay](https://www.caremytrip.com/package.html?id=vietnam-hanoi-halong-4d) — Hanoi & Halong Bay, Vietnam, 3N / 4D, On request. Hanoi's old quarter and an overnight cruise through Halong Bay.
- See the full catalogue (50+ packages) at https://www.caremytrip.com/packages.html

## Blog posts
- [Char Dham Yatra 2026 Complete Travel Guide](https://www.caremytrip.com/blog.html?id=chardham-yatra-2026-guide) — Chardham Yatra, 22 Jun 2026. A practical guide to Char Dham Yatra routes, best season, package options, helicopter choices and planning tips from CareMyTrip.
- [Kedarnath and Badrinath Do Dham Yatra Planning Guide](https://www.caremytrip.com/blog.html?id=kedarnath-badrinath-do-dham-guide) — Do Dham Yatra, 22 Jun 2026. How to plan a Do Dham Yatra covering Kedarnath and Badrinath from Haridwar, Delhi or Dehradun.
- [Best Kerala Tour Package Itinerary for Families and Couples](https://www.caremytrip.com/blog.html?id=best-kerala-tour-package-itinerary) — Kerala, 22 Jun 2026. Explore Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey and Kovalam with a Kerala itinerary designed for comfort and value.
- [Auli and Harsil Travel Guide for Uttarakhand Holidays](https://www.caremytrip.com/blog.html?id=auli-harsil-uttarakhand-travel-guide) — Uttarakhand, 22 Jun 2026. Two scenic Uttarakhand holidays: Auli for snow and Harsil for quiet Himalayan stays.
